description: Synthetic HL7 v2.4 QRY^R02 bidirectional host-query from an EDAN H60S: a QRD (query definition) + QRF (query filter) requesting the results (QRD-9 = RES) for sample SPEC-0231, keyed by the QRD-4 query id Q0231-01 the answer must echo. The host answers with an ORF^R04 carrying the result (LIS-18 / S1.6). NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-18 / S1.6 bidirectional host-query — EDAN H60S LIS interface manual, query/QRD-QRF profile)
source.note: Application payload only (no MLLP framing). The query subject (sample id SPEC-0231) is in QRD-8; the correlation id (Q0231-01) is in QRD-4 and is echoed by the ORF^R04 answer. The live bidirectional host-query deployment to pilot sites is deferred post-pilot under change control (ADR-0008); this fixture proves the QRD/QRF protocol substrate in the simulator. CAVEAT: the MSH identity here (MSH-3 'H60S' / MSH-4 'EDAN') is the pre-bench synthetic shape — the 2026-07-06 bench (LIS-20) proved the real H60S announces MSH-3 'H60^7907' / MSH-4 'EDANLAB' (see edan-h60s-oru-r01); no real query frame was captured, so this fixture keeps its synthetic identity until a real H60S query capture replaces it.
